name: Clari
description: A revenue intelligence platform focused on forecast accuracy and pipeline management. Clari uses AI to analyse CRM data, email activity, and calendar signals to provide a more accurate picture of pipeline health and likely revenue outcomes.
whyUseIt: Clari solves the forecasting problem. Most sales forecasts are based on what reps tell their managers, which is often biased or incomplete. Clari analyses actual engagement signals — email frequency, meeting cadence, stakeholder involvement — to predict which deals will close and which won't. For AEs, it helps you understand your own pipeline objectively. For managers, it transforms forecasting from art to science.
aiCapabilities: Clari's AI predicts deal outcomes, identifies pipeline risks before they materialise, automates forecast roll-ups, and provides deal scoring based on engagement signals rather than rep self-reporting.
funnelPosition: Mid to bottom of funnel — pipeline management, forecasting, and deal inspection
sellerWorkflow: AEs review their Clari dashboard weekly to check deal health scores, identify at-risk deals, and ensure their forecast categories are accurate. Managers run forecast calls using Clari's pipeline view instead of spreadsheets.
managerExpects: AEs reviewing their deal health scores weekly, responding to risk alerts promptly, and using Clari's data (not gut feel) to justify their forecast commitments.
demoDescription: View the pipeline waterfall showing how deals have moved week-over-week, check AI deal health scores, review risk alerts, and submit a forecast with commit/upside/best case categories.

vocabulary.definition: A visual showing how pipeline has changed period-over-period: new deals added, deals moved forward, deals slipped, and deals lost.
Clari's AI-generated deal health rating based on activity signals, engagement patterns, and historical close data.

beginnerMistakes: Ignoring Clari's risk alerts — they're based on engagement data, not opinions, so they're usually accurate
Not updating CRM data — Clari is only as good as the data it analyses
Over-relying on AI scores without applying your own deal knowledge
